title: Wednesday

characters.name: Wednesday Addams
characters.archetype: The deadpan goth genius. Refuses to participate in any ritual that wasn't her idea. Solves murders with a smirk.

characters.name: Enid Sinclair
characters.archetype: Wednesday's pastel werewolf roommate. The opposite vibe, became the best friend nobody saw coming.

characters.name: Tyler Galpin
characters.archetype: The townie barista turned monster. The boyfriend twist that broke the internet.

characters.name: Xavier Thorpe
characters.archetype: The artist crush who got friend-zoned by Wednesday's plot.

characters.name: Bianca Barclay
characters.archetype: The siren queen bee. Originally an antagonist, became a complicated ally.

characters.name: Larissa Weems
characters.archetype: The principal. Glamorous adversary, quietly Wednesday's protector. (Killed off S1.)

characters.name: Morticia Addams
characters.archetype: The mom. Catherine Zeta-Jones in pure Addams elegance.

characters.name: Gomez Addams
characters.archetype: The dad. Luis Guzmán brought a softer, lovestruck Gomez.

characters.name: Pugsley Addams
characters.archetype: The little brother who Wednesday tortures with affection.

characters.name: Thing
characters.archetype: The disembodied hand. Pure comedic genius, somehow has a personality.

signature_quotes: I find social media to be a soul-sucking void of fake validation.
I'm a writer, not a sociopath. Although I do keep my options open.
Sartre said hell is other people. He was my first crush.
I'd rather you hate me for who I am than love me for who I'm not.
viral_moments: The dance scene at the Rave'N — Jenna Ortega choreographed it herself; broke TikTok in November 2022.
Wednesday playing the cello on a New Jersey rooftop — Paint It Black solo.
Thing tracking Wednesday's mood swings on a chart.
Wednesday's cold-stare straight into the camera at Rave'N.
The 'You hold a particular fascination for me' Tyler reveal.
Lady Gaga cameo in the dance sequel TikTok edit (not in the show but became canon online).
memes: Wednesday's dance choreography on TikTok — millions of recreations.
'I find social media to be a soul-sucking void' as a literal Twitter bio meme.
Wednesday's deadpan stare GIF used in every Slack reaction channel.
Lady Gaga's 'Bloody Mary' becoming the song of the dance — re-charted years after release.
The 'Wednesday and Enid as opposites attract' fan-shipping content.
Thing memes (he's a hand, but he's the show's MVP).
off_screen_drama: Jenna Ortega has talked about rewriting some of her own dialogue when she felt it was 'out of character'.
Tim Burton came back to TV directing for the first time in years.
The dance sequence wasn't choreographed by a professional — Jenna improvised it.
Season 2 production was delayed by the 2023 strikes; finally aired in late 2025.
Percy Hynes White (Xavier) was written off after off-screen allegations he denies.
running_jokes: Wednesday somehow always wins the argument while seeming to lose.
Enid's pastel chaos vs. Wednesday's monochrome restraint.
Thing being more emotionally available than any human character.
Gomez and Morticia being the only adults on the show with any chemistry.
Wednesday refusing to acknowledge any romantic interest until S1 finale.
